data.title: Fufeng Group Limited Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
Fufeng Group Limited ( (HK:0546) ) has provided an update.

Fufeng Group Limited has announced a final cash dividend of HKD 0.19 per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024. The dividend will be paid on June 27, 2025, following shareholder approval on May 29, 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s financial performance and commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

data.title: Xiwang Special Steel to Delist from Hong Kong Stock Exchange
data.description:
Xiwang Special Steel Co ( (HK:1266) ) has issued an update.

Xiwang Special Steel Company Limited announced the cancellation of its listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, effective from March 31, 2025. This decision follows a series of delays in publishing interim results and a winding-up order, impacting shareholders as the shares will no longer be tradeable on the exchange.

More about Xiwang Special Steel Co

Xiwang Special Steel Company Limited is a Hong Kong-based company involved in the special steel industry. The company focuses on producing and distributing special steel products, serving various sectors that require high-quality steel materials.

data.title: Sinohealth Holdings Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results Driven by AI Innovations
data.description:
Sinohealth Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:2361) ) has shared an announcement.

Sinohealth Holdings Ltd. announced its annual results for 2024, highlighting a 1.9% increase in revenue and a 10.8% rise in net profit. The company has made significant technological advancements, particularly in AI large models, which have enhanced operational efficiency and profitability. The gross profit margin improved to 57.8%, and the net profit margin increased to 27.7%. These developments have positioned Sinohealth for continued growth and strengthened its competitive edge in the healthcare industry.

More about Sinohealth Holdings Ltd.

Sinohealth Holdings Ltd. operates in the healthcare industry, providing digital and intelligent solutions through AI-driven technology. The company focuses on offering services such as AI agent applications for healthcare, pharmacies, business, health management, and R&D, leveraging its extensive experience and data assets to support digital transformation and market expansion.

data.title: Synex Renewable Energy to be Acquired by Sitka Power for C$25.2 Million
data.description:
An announcement from Synex Internt’l ( (TSE:SXI) ) is now available.

Synex Renewable Energy Corporation announced an agreement to be acquired by Sitka Power Inc. for C$2.40 per share, valuing the company at approximately C$25.2 million. This transaction, which offers a 58% premium over the 20-day volume weighted average price, has been deemed fair and in the best interests of shareholders by Synex’s board. The acquisition provides immediate liquidity and value to shareholders, while Sitka views it as a strategic opportunity to expand its platform.

More about Synex Internt’l

Synex Renewable Energy Corporation operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing on a diverse portfolio of operating, construction-ready, and development projects primarily based in British Columbia.

data.title: Norges Bank Increases Stake in Card Factory PLC
data.description:
An update from Card Factory ( (GB:CARD) ) is now available.

Card Factory PLC has announced a change in major holdings, with Norges Bank increasing its voting rights in the company to 3.168670% as of March 26, 2025. This acquisition of financial instruments by Norges Bank signifies a notable shift in shareholder dynamics, potentially impacting the company’s strategic decisions and influencing its market position.

More about Card Factory

Card Factory PLC is a UK-based company operating in the retail industry, primarily focused on the sale of greeting cards, gifts, and related products. The company targets a broad market, offering a wide range of products that cater to various occasions and celebrations.

data.title: So-Young International Reports 2024 Financial Results Amid Strategic Expansion
data.description:
The latest update is out from So-Young International ( (SY) ).

So-Young International Inc. reported its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024, highlighting a challenging period with a net loss primarily due to a significant one-time goodwill impairment charge. Despite a decrease in total revenues and a net loss for the year, the company experienced substantial growth in its aesthetic treatment services, driven by the expansion of its branded aesthetic centers. The company declared a special cash dividend, reflecting its strategic focus on long-term growth and operational efficiency. The expansion of its network to 19 aesthetic centers across major cities in China and the improvement in customer retention rates underscore its efforts to strengthen its market position.

More about So-Young International

So-Young International Inc. is a leading aesthetic treatment platform in China, connecting consumers with online services and offline treatments. The company focuses on the medical aesthetics industry, providing a range of services and products, including aesthetic treatment services and medical products.

YTD Price Performance: 15.85%

Average Trading Volume: 88,562

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Somec S.p.A. Releases Documentation for Upcoming Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Somec S.p.A. ( (IT:SOM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Somec S.p.A. has announced the availability of documentation for its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for April 29, 2025. This includes the meeting notice, explanatory reports, and proxy forms, accessible at the company’s registered office, website, and authorized storage mechanism. This announcement ensures transparency and accessibility for stakeholders, reinforcing Somec’s commitment to corporate governance.

More about Somec S.p.A.

Somec S.p.A. is a global leader in engineering, design, and implementation of complex turnkey projects in civil and naval sectors. It operates through three business units: Horizons, Talenta, and Mestieri, focusing on naval architecture, professional kitchen systems, and bespoke interiors. With over 40 years of experience, the company is known for its quality and reliability, employing over 1,000 people across 12 countries and generating revenues of 383 million Euro in 2024.

data.title: AviChina Reports 2024 Financial Results: Revenue Growth Amid Profit Decline
data.description:
AviChina Industry & Technology Co ( (HK:2357) ) has issued an announcement.

AviChina Industry & Technology Co., Ltd. announced its annual results for the year ended December 31, 2024, showing a steady development in business with a revenue increase of 2.62% to RMB 86,971 million. Despite the revenue growth, the net profit attributable to the parent company decreased by 10.63% to RMB 2,187 million. The board recommended a final dividend of RMB 0.081 per share, slightly lower than the previous year’s RMB 0.088 per share. These results reflect a stable yet challenging financial performance, impacting the company’s profitability and dividend payouts.

More about AviChina Industry & Technology Co

AviChina Industry & Technology Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in China, primarily operating in the aviation and technology sectors. The company focuses on the development and production of aviation products and related technology services.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.19B

data.description:

T.S. Lines Limited has announced the composition of its board of directors and their respective roles within the company. The board comprises both executive and independent non-executive directors, with specific members assigned to the audit, remuneration, and nomination committees. This announcement highlights the company’s governance structure, which is crucial for maintaining transparency and accountability, potentially impacting investor confidence and stakeholder relations.

data.title: Boardwalktech and Trillium Partner to Revolutionize Supply Chain Solutions
data.description:
An update from Boardwalktech Software ( (TSE:BWLK) ) is now available.

Boardwalktech Software Corp. has announced a partnership with Trillium Digital Services to enhance supply chain solutions, leveraging digital thread innovations. This collaboration aims to bridge the gap between legacy systems and modern technologies, improving employee experiences and business outcomes. The partnership is expected to accelerate Boardwalktech’s market penetration and refine their Unity Central platform, addressing specific industry challenges while maintaining core capabilities. The announcement was made at the ISG Xperience Summit, where both companies showcased their advancements in AI-powered experience transformation strategies.

More about Boardwalktech Software

Boardwalktech Software Corp. is a leading Information Intelligence software company that specializes in digital ledger technology. The company focuses on providing solutions for managing structured and unstructured data, enabling simultaneous collaboration while preserving data fidelity and provenance. Their platform has gained traction among Fortune 500 companies in sectors such as food manufacturing, technology, telecommunications, and consumer products.
